data.name: BasicUnderOverMarket
data.value: { "MarketId": 2, "ProviderId": 70, "CreationDate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5889465Z", "LastUpdate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5894330Z", "Bets": [ { "Id": 21948577322147188, "BetStatus": 1, "Name": "Under", "Line": "2.5", "BaseLine": "2.5", "CurrentPrice": 2.2, "CreationDate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5889915Z", "LastUpdate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5894330Z", "PlayerName": null, "PlayerId": null, "ParticipantId": null, "ProviderBetId": "1480387825" }, { "Id": 21377463522147188, "BetStatus": 1, "Name": "Over", "Line": "2.5", "BaseLine": "2.5", "CurrentPrice": 1.6, "CreationDate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5889698Z", "LastUpdate": "2024-07-21T19:39:44.5894330Z", "PlayerName": null, "PlayerId": null, "ParticipantId": null, "ProviderBetId": "1480387824" } ], "Market": { "Id": 2, "Name": "Under/Over", "IsActive": true, "ActivePeriod": 100, "SettlementPeriod": 0, "MarketFamilyId": 7, "CoverageLevel": 0, "OppositeId": null, "MarketFamily": { "Id": 7, "Name": "Under/Over", "MarketLogicGroup": 2, "MarketBetGroupId": 1, "MarketPropertiesId": 2, "AutoCompleteMissingBets": true, "MarketBets": [ { "Id": 1, "GroupId": 1, "BetName": "Under", "IsMainLine": false, "IsOptional": true, "Order": 1 }, { "Id": 2, "GroupId": 1, "BetName": "Over", "IsMainLine": true, "IsOptional": true, "Order": 2 } ], "MarketProperties": { "Id": 2, "SwapEnabled": false, "LineRegexFormat": "^-?\\d+(\\.0|\\.[2|7]?5)?$", "IsWithLine": true, "IsSpecialMarket": false, "BetRegexFormat": null, "LineTypes": [ 1, 2, 4 ], "IsOutright": false, "MarketType": 0 } }, "IncidentTypeId": 9, "Stage": 10, "Description": "Will the score be under/over a specific line" }, "MessageGuid": "15d5137d-6ee1-4b70-848f-1b5015ab2960", "ProcessingGuid": "94fc4921-01f9-4660-aa97-2f6a0b6f72de", "ProviderFixtureId": "14158354", "RobotId": 377, "FixtureDto": { "Id": 22147189, "SportId": 6046, "LeagueId": 42667, "StartDate": "2024-07-21T19:00:00" } }
